channel.title: Automatic change page contents without click any page
channel.description:
Hi Friends,
I need your help i have faced one issue for automatic change page contents.
When i am on inner page and not click to any page link then some time innerpage content automatic change to homepage and not change in taskbar url.
Please help me any one for this.
Thank you.

item.title: Automatic change page contents without click any page
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @bhagvan.vrinsofts

Could you post a link to a repo please so that others can see your code and clone your project if necessary.

Please see here for details of the information that you can provide that will best help others to help you.

Read full topic
item.source: Automatic change page contents without click any page

item.title: Automatic change page contents without click any page

Hi Friends,

I need your help i have faced one issue for automatic change page contents.

When i am on inner page and not click to any page link then some time innerpage content automatic change to homepage and not change in taskbar url.
